body: ## [5.3.2](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/compare/v5.3.1...v5.3.2) (2018-10-30) ### Bug Fixes * **sffv:** clamp maxFacetHits to the allowed range ([algolia/react-instantsearch#1696](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/issues/1696)) ([4d7d6a3](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/commit/4d7d6a3))
